Sun Mang (Ju) еӯ«еЈҫ (жҳ·)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Mang (еӯ«еЈҫ), styledJu (жҳ·). Third son of Sun Xiu. Oppressed by Sun Hao. Sun Mang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
